description: Append-only transparency log. Each entry records a window commitment, grader version, and data covenant. Entries are also published to Sigstore/Rekor for independent verification.
verify: Each entry's prev_hash links to the prior entry. Recompute SHA-256 of the prior entry's JSON to verify the chain. Rekor entries are independently verifiable at rekor.sigstore.dev.
note: No entries yet — the first window commitment lands at launch, and this log then grows append-only. The battery and rubric commitments that gate every score are already live and independently verifiable at /battery-commitments.json and /rubric-history.json.
